sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53359" key="karkineuth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καρκῐν-ευτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n53359.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crab-catcher</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
